description:
Navigate to the WCAG 2.1 specification page (https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG21/) and save it as a PDF at ~/Documents/WCAG21_Archive.pdf. Use Firefox's native Print-to-PDF dialog (Ctrl+P). You MUST configure the following formatting settings in the 'More settings' section of the print dialog:
- Orientation: Landscape
- Paper Size: A4
- Print backgrounds: Checked (Enabled)
- Print headers and footers: Unchecked (Disabled)
Save the file to the exact path specified.
